stemHtml: Which of the following is a requirement for an applicant for a sailplane towing rating?

options.a: 40 hrs of PIC in aeroplanes or TMGs.
options.b: At least 10 instruction flights towing a sailplane, including at least 5 dual instruction flights.
options.c: 30 hrs of flight time as PIC and 40 take-offs and landings in aeroplanes or TMGs, completed after the issue of the license.
options.d: 6 familiarisation flights in a sailplane which is launched by aircraft.
